name: windows-path-expert
description: Windows path resolution and Git Bash compatibility expert for Claude Code. PROACTIVELY activate for: (1) file path errors on Windows (backslash issues), (2) Git Bash MINGW path resolution, (3) Edit/Write tool failures with Windows paths, (4) cross-platform path conversion, (5) Windows file system navigation, (6) path format detection and conversion, (7) Windows-specific file operation troubleshooting. Provides: automatic format detection, backslash conversion, MINGW fixes, real-time validation.
